heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPingTools Privacy PolicyStreamSoft ("we", "our", or "us") will collect and use information obtained via the PingTools Mobile Application    ("PingTools", "Application") as described in this policy. In doing so, we are committed to protecting and respecting    your privacy    and personal data, in accordance with applicable data protection, privacy rules and data protection laws. We do not    sell or rent your personally identifiable information to any third party.

This policy explains how we use information we collect when you using the PingTools, together with ourEnd User License Agreementand any other documents referred to on it, sets out the basis    on which any information we obtain about you will be processed by us. Please read the following carefully to understand    our views and practices regarding your personal data and how we will treat it.    By using the PingTools you are accepting and consenting to the practices described in this policy.

Privacy guarantees specific to our servicesWe will not collect any personal details from you such as your name, email address, phone number or other contact information.    We will collect technical information on how the application is used for diagnostic purposes. We will use Firebase    Analytics and Crashlytics to collect diagnostic information and error reports. Both services is part of Google.    Information on how Google uses your data is available in the article:

How Google uses data when you use our partners’ sites or apps.We will also collect information that you enter when using some PingTools utilities, which require the use of our    backend service. This information includes resource addresses (host names), IP addresses, MAC addresses, WiFi networks SSID and BSSID.

We will collect information about the names of your favorite devices and networks, which you save in the PingTools.    We will do this solely to ensure synchronization between your devices within the PingCloud service.    You can completely disable the collection of diagnostic information using the Privacy item in the main Application settings.Where we store your personal dataTo offer a consistent service to you we manage the Application from servers provided by a third party cloud service

provider that are located in USA and Germany. The data that we collect from you may be transferred to, and stored to    these servers. We will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this    privacy policy and applicable privacy laws. Unfortunately, the transmission of information via the Internet is not    completely secure. Although we will do our best to protect your data, we cannot guarantee the security of your data
transmitted from the Application. Once we have received you

r information, we will use strict procedures and security    features to prevent unauthorised access.PingTools Free and PingTools ProPingTools is distributed on a paid and free basis. A free version called PingTools Free ("Free"). The paid version    is called PingTools Pro ("Pro").The Free version contains third-party libraries for monetization purposes.We will use Google AdMob to display ads. This services is part of Google.

To learn more about the use of this    aggregated anonymous data, we recommend that you reviewOpenSignal’s    privacy policy. To opt-out of our sharing of this information with OpenSignal, please use according item in the    Application Privacy settings.You can also purchase a Pro version of the Application that does not contain unnecessary third-party services.

Links to third party websitesPingTools may contain links to and from the websites of our partner networks, advertisers and affiliates.    If you follow a link to any of these apps or websites, please note that these have their own privacy    policies and that we do not accept any responsibility or liability for those policies. Please check the policies    before you submit any data to these apps or websites.

Your rightsYou have the right to access information that we hold about you. All information we hold about you may be requested    viaprivacy@pingtools.org. You can delete this data by writing    toprivacy@pingtools.org.You can exercise your right to prevent such processing directly within the Privacy item in main PingTools    application settings.
Changes to our privacy policyAny changes we may make to our privacy policy in the future will be notified via the PingTools.

Contact usIf you have questions or comments about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us atprivacy@pingtools.orgor 4 Nekrasova Street, Shebekino, Belgorod region, Russian Federation.Thanks for reading. We hope you enjoy using PingTools!
